blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Ensure that all changes made by users are logged with timestamps and user identifiers.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of who changed what and when, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm the existence of such an audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that changes made by the owner are tracked or recorded in the system. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process, as the requirement was not directly supported by the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for changes made by the owner.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that all changes made by users are logged with timestamps and user identifiers.
